description: The file defines the main activity for a Flutter Android application, extending FlutterActivity. It serves as the entry point for the Android platform within the Flutter project, enabling the Flutter UI to be displayed inside an Android app.

classes.name: MainActivity
classes.description: The main activity class for the Flutter Android application, extending FlutterActivity to embed Flutter UI into the Android lifecycle.

methods.name: MainActivity
methods.description: Constructor (or primary class initializer), which inherits functionality from FlutterActivity.
